name: Noodles with Mustard Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3 or 4 quarts of water to a boil.
2. Prepare the mustard butter by creaming together the butter and remaining ingredients, either by hand, food processor, or blender.
3. Add the noodles and salt to the boiling water.
4. Cook the noodles until al dente (bite into a noodle to check for doneness).
5. Drain the noodles thoroughly.
6. Toss the noodles with the prepared mustard butter until each strand is coated.
7. Serve immediately. Serves 6
